product_overview: Jhome Enterprise Platform is an administrative dashboard for managing the company’s website content, academy operations, media assets, users, contact messages, and global system settings. It supports authenticated administrators in performing core content and operations tasks through a Firebase-backed interface.
core_goals: Log in and log out as an administrator
Navigate the dashboard sections and open each main management area
Create, edit, publish, and delete CMS articles
Create, edit, and delete success stories
Review and manage academy courses, enrollment requests, students, and instructors
Create and manage users, including role changes
Review contact messages and mark them as read or delete them
Update and save global system settings

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Administrators can sign in to access the dashboard and sign out when finished.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Submit login form -> See the admin dashboard
Navigate to /index.html -> Click logout -> See the login state again
Navigate to /index.html -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Submit login form -> See the dashboard persist after returning to the page

features.name: CMS Articles
features.description: Administrators can manage articles in the content management system, including creating, editing, deleting, and publishing articles.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Open the articles section -> Start a new article -> Fill in the article details -> Submit the form -> See the new article listed
Navigate to /index.html -> Open the articles section -> Choose an existing article to edit -> Update the article details -> Submit the form -> See the updated article reflected in the list
Navigate to /index.html -> Open the articles section -> Choose an existing article to delete -> Confirm deletion -> See the article removed from the list
Navigate to /index.html -> Open the articles section -> Choose an article to publish -> Save the change -> See the article marked as published

features.name: Success Stories
features.description: Administrators can create, update, and remove success stories from the site content.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Open the success stories section -> Start a new story -> Fill in the story details -> Submit the form -> See the new story listed
Navigate to /index.html -> Open the success stories section -> Choose an existing story to edit -> Update the story details -> Submit the form -> See the updated story reflected in the list
Navigate to /index.html -> Open the success stories section -> Choose an existing story to delete -> Confirm deletion -> See the story removed from the list

features.name: Projects
features.description: Administrators can manage the portfolio by creating, updating, and deleting projects.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Open the projects section -> Start a new project -> Fill in the project details -> Submit the form -> See the new project listed
Navigate to /index.html -> Open the projects section -> Choose an existing project to edit -> Update the project details -> Submit the form -> See the updated project reflected in the list
Navigate to /index.html -> Open the projects section -> Choose an existing project to delete -> Confirm deletion -> See the project removed from the list

features.name: Media Library
features.description: Administrators can upload images, preview them, and delete unused media files.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Open the media library -> Upload an image file -> See the image appear in the library
Navigate to /index.html -> Open the media library -> Select an image -> Preview the image -> Return to the library view
Navigate to /index.html -> Open the media library -> Choose an image to delete -> Confirm deletion -> See the image removed from the library

features.name: Academy Management
features.description: Administrators can manage academy courses, enrollment requests, students, and instructors.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Open the academy section -> Switch to the courses area -> Review the course list
Navigate to /index.html -> Open the academy section -> Switch to the enrollment requests area -> Review a pending request -> Approve the enrollment -> See the request status change to approved
Navigate to /index.html -> Open the academy section -> Switch to the enrollment requests area -> Review a pending request -> Reject the enrollment -> See the request status change to rejected
Navigate to /index.html -> Open the academy section -> Switch to the students area -> Review the student list
Navigate to /index.html -> Open the academy section -> Switch to the instructors area -> Review the instructor list

features.name: Users Management
features.description: Administrators can create users, update user details, delete users, and change user roles.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Open the users section -> Add a new user -> Fill in the user details -> Submit the form -> See the new user listed
Navigate to /index.html -> Open the users section -> Choose an existing user -> Change the user role -> Save the update -> See the role changed in the list
Navigate to /index.html -> Open the users section -> Choose an existing user -> Delete the user -> Confirm deletion -> See the user removed from the list

features.name: Contact Messages
features.description: Administrators can review incoming contact messages and manage their status.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Open the messages section -> Open a message -> Read the message details
Navigate to /index.html -> Open the messages section -> Open a message -> Mark it as read -> See the read status update
Navigate to /index.html -> Open the messages section -> Open a message -> Delete the message -> See the message removed from the list

features.name: Global Settings
features.description: Administrators can adjust and save system-wide settings for the platform.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Open the settings section -> Modify the settings -> Save the changes -> See the updated settings retained

features.name: Academy Management
features.description: Manage courses, students, and enrollment requests
user_interactions: Click Academy related tabs (Courses, Enrollment, Students, Instructors)

features.name: Users Management
features.description: Create, update, delete users and change roles
